ideation: This animation sequence simulates planting a flag, starting with both arms at rest and culminating in the left arm holding the flag aloft. The right arm provides support and balance. The sequence uses a three-frame approach, emphasizing clear transitions and avoiding intermediate steps. Frame 1: Both arms start in a neutral, relaxed position. The left arm is slightly raised to mimic preparation for planting the flag. Frame 2: The left arm extends upward, while the right arm extends to provide balance and support. The wrists are angled slightly to simulate the action of planting the flag. Frame 3: The left arm holds the flag aloft in a victory pose, and the right arm returns to the side. This final pose represents the successful planting of the flag.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to plant
left arm raises flag high, right arm balances
left arm holds flag steady, right arm rests
